home.heroTitle: The ultimate vault for card collectors
home.heroSubtitle: Certified singles, sealed boxes, and exclusive memorabilia, verified by experts and shipped fully insured.
home.breaksSubtitle: Join our live-streamed breaks and lock in your spot before they sell out.

categories.singleDesc: Certified and raw cards from the most sought-after players and sets.
categories.sealedDesc: Factory-sealed boxes, blasters, and hobby boxes, ready to open or hold.
categories.memorabiliaDesc: Signed and authenticated pieces — jerseys, balls, and one-of-a-kind items.

why.title: Guaranteed authenticity
why.body: Every card and memorabilia piece goes through a rigorous verification process before joining our catalog.

why.title: Professional grading
why.body: We work with PSA, BGS, and SGC to certify the condition and real value of every card.

why.title: Secure, insured shipping
why.body: We pack with rigid materials and full insurance so your collection arrives intact.

faq.q: Which grading companies do you use?
faq.a: We work with PSA, BGS, and SGC, the three most recognized grading houses in the industry, ensuring consistent authentication and grading standards.

faq.q: How do you guarantee card authenticity?
faq.a: All singles and memorabilia are verified by our expert team and, when applicable, include third-party certification with a traceable serial number.
We ship in rigid, bend-proof packaging with insurance included on every order; delivery times vary by destination and the method selected at checkout.

faq.q: What is a live break and how do I join?
faq.a: A live break is a live-streamed event where sealed boxes are opened and each participant receives the cards for their assigned spot or team; you can reserve your spot from the Live Breaks section.

faq.q: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a: Checkout is coming soon; for now you can browse the full catalog and save items to your cart.

footer.business: Dynasty Card Vault is a marketplace specializing in sports and TCG collectible cards, sealed boxes, and authenticated memorabilia, built for collectors who demand quality, transparency, and security in every transaction.
